problem: What synthetic material perfectly mimics bone's mechanical and biological properties?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: If Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) is applied to and, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
